label: EasyPost
description: Multi-carrier shipping, tracking, and insurance via the EasyPost API.

form.title: Connect EasyPost
form.subtitle: Paste your EasyPost API key to start creating shipments, buying postage, and tracking packages.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a Test or Production API key from your EasyPost Account Settings. Production keys start with `EZak`, test keys start with `EZtk`. Simplest setup — no OAuth required.
methods.how_to:
## Get your EasyPost API Key

1. Log in at [easypost.com](https://www.easypost.com) and click your account avatar in the top-right corner.
2. Go to **Account Settings → API Keys**.
3. You'll see two sections: **Test API Keys** and **Production API Keys**.
   - Test keys begin with `EZtk` — safe for development, no real charges.
   - Production keys begin with `EZak` — creates real shipments and charges your account.
4. Click the **copy** icon next to the key you want to use.
5. Paste it into the **API Key** field below and select the matching **Environment**.

## Notes

- Keep your Production key secret — it can create labels and charge your payment method.
- If you suspect a key has been compromised, roll it immediately from Account Settings → API Keys → **Regenerate**.
- Regenerating a key invalidates the old one; update Anton right away to restore connectivity.
- You can safely use the Test environment key during development — EasyPost won't bill you for test-mode shipments.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in easypost.com → Account Settings → API Keys. Production keys start with EZak, test keys start with EZtk.

fields.name: environment
fields.label: Environment
fields.description: Match this to the key type you pasted above. Test mode is free and safe for development.
